purpose: Source files to load into a future custom GPT/project knowledge base
status: Dockerization completed. MISIS_Digital Student Support API now runs in Docker on app via docker compose while preserving external port 8080, Nginx reverse proxy flow, Prometheus /metrics scrape and Promtail/Loki file-log flow.
last_completed_stage: Dockerization: Docker Engine and Compose installed on app; image misis-digital-student-support-api:local built; container misis-digital-student-support-api runs on host port 8080; app.service disabled but kept for rollback; /opt/app and /var/log/app mounted as transitional volumes until PostgreSQL/stdout logging stages.
current_next_stage: PostgreSQL / DB: create separate db VM, install PostgreSQL, migrate tickets storage from /opt/app/tickets.json to database, prepare ticket_events for future counters/SLA metrics.

runtime.app_backend: Docker container on app:8080 via docker compose
